curveLiquidityDriftBps.min: proxy: USDC+WETH balances in Uniswap USDC/WETH 500 pool

curveBalancesDriftBps.min: proxy: per-token balances in Uniswap USDC/WETH 500 pool

rationale: Base finalized block 47264207. Bps fields use max observed drift times 1.5 rounded up to 50/100/250/500/1000 bps. Sequencer startedAt is an uptime epoch, so the locked operator staleness threshold remains the existing 3600 second grace rather than elapsed uptime.
